title: picris littoralis
intro: Picris littoralis, also known as Rock Dittany or Beach Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in sesquiterpene lactones, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, reduced pain, and improved immune function. Picris littoralis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional or herbalist.
